welcome:

👋 Welcome to Nehru Arts and Science College (NASC)!

admission.menu:
📝 ADMISSION PROCESS FOR 2026

✅ STEP 1: APPLICATION
- Apply online or offline
- Fill registration form
- Pay application fee

✅ STEP 2: DOCUMENT SUBMISSION
- Submit required documents
- Original certificate verification
- Academic record check

✅ STEP 3: COUNSELING
- Merit-based counseling
- Program selection guidance
- Seat allocation

✅ STEP 4: INTERVIEW
- One-on-one with Principal & HOD
- Parents meeting encouraged
- Course guidance provided

✅ STEP 5: CONFIRMATION
- Fee payment
- ID card photo & uniform measurement
- Admit card issued

📱 Apply Online: https://nasccbe.ac.in/admission/
📞 Helpline: +91 887 000 5337

What do you need?

A. Eligibility Criteria
B. Required Documents List
C. Admission Schedule & Dates
D. How to Apply Online
E. Admission Centres Near You
F. Back to Main Menu

Reply: A, B, C, D, E, or F
admission.A:
✅ ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA

📚 UNDERGRADUATE (UG):
- 12th Pass from recognized board
- Minimum 50% marks (45% for reserved)
- Subject requirements vary by course
  * Science courses: Need PCB/PCM
  * Commerce/Arts: Any stream

📚 POSTGRADUATE (PG):
- Bachelor's degree in relevant field
- Minimum 50% marks (45% for reserved)
- Entrance test for some courses

📚 RESEARCH (Ph.D.):
- Master's degree with 55% marks
- NET/GATE/SLET qualified (preferred)
- Research proposal submission

📌 Note: Eligibility varies by specific program

Need course-specific eligibility?
Reply with course name or
Type F for Main Menu
admission.B:
📄 REQUIRED DOCUMENTS LIST

For ADMISSION, bring:

📎 Original + 2 Photocopies:

1. ✅ 10th Mark Sheet & Certificate
2. ✅ 12th Mark Sheet & Certificate
3. ✅ Transfer Certificate (TC)
4. ✅ Conduct Certificate
5. ✅ Community Certificate (if applicable)
6. ✅ Income Certificate (for scholarship)
7. ✅ Aadhaar Card
8. ✅ Passport Size Photos - 4 nos
9. ✅ Migration Certificate (other state/board)
10. ✅ Character Certificate

📌 Additional for PG/Ph.D:
- UG Degree Certificate
- UG Mark Sheets (All Semesters)
- NET/GATE Scorecard (if applicable)

⚠️ Bring originals for verification!

- UG / PG / Ph.D.

fees.3:
🎓 SCHOLARSHIPS AVAILABLE

📚 GOVERNMENT SCHOLARSHIPS:

1️⃣ Post Matric Scholarship (SC/ST/OBC)
   - Government funded
   - Based on family income

2️⃣ Tamil Nadu State Scholarship
   - For Tamil Nadu students
   - Merit cum means based

3️⃣ Central Sector Scheme
   - For meritorious students
   - Income < 8 LPA

🏆 COLLEGE SCHOLARSHIPS:

1️⃣ Merit Scholarship
   - 12th marks > 90%: 100% fee waiver
   - 12th marks > 85%: 50% fee waiver
   - 12th marks > 80%: 25% fee waiver

2️⃣ Sports Scholarship
   - State/National level players
   - Up to 50% fee concession

3️⃣ Need-based Scholarship
   - Financial assistance
   - Case-by-case evaluation

📝 How to Apply:
Submit documents at admission time

For more details:
📞 Call: +91 887 000 5337

faq.1:
❓ ADMISSION QUERIES - FAQ

Q1: When do admissions start?
A: After 12th results, usually May-June

Q2: Can I apply online?
A: Yes! Visit nasccbe.ac.in/admission/

Q3: Is there an entrance exam?
A: Most UG courses: Merit-based (12th marks)
   Some PG courses: Entrance test

Q4: Can I change course after admission?
A: Before classes start: Yes (subject to availability)
   After classes start: Generally no

Q5: Is there a management quota?
A: Yes, limited seats available

Q6: Can students from other states apply?
A: Yes! We welcome students from all over India

Q7: Last date to apply?
A: Check website or call: +91 887 000 5337

Q8: Application fee?
A: Contact admission office for current fees

More questions?
Type 9 to speak to counselor
Type 0 for FAQ Menu
faq.2:
❓ COURSE & ELIGIBILITY - FAQ

Q1: Which course is best for me?
A: Depends on your interest & 12th stream
   Type 2 in main menu for course details

Q2: Minimum marks required?
A: Generally 50% in 12th (45% for reserved)

Q3: Can I do B.Sc CS without Maths in 12th?
A: No, Maths is mandatory for CS courses

Q4: Can commerce students do BCA?
A: Yes! BCA is open to all streams

Q5: Is B.Com open to science students?
A: Yes! Any stream can do B.Com

Q6: What's the difference between BCA and B.Sc CS?
A: BCA: More application-focused
   B.Sc CS: More theory & research-focused

Q7: Can I do MBA after BCA/B.Sc?
A: Yes! After graduation, you can do MBA

Q8: Which course has best placements?
A: Computer Science, AI/ML, Data Science, BBA

Need course details?
Type 2 in main menu
Type 0 for FAQ Menu
faq.3:
❓ FEES & SCHOLARSHIPS - FAQ

Q1: What is the total course fee?
A: Varies by course. Call: +91 887 000 5337

Q2: Can I pay fees in installments?
A: Yes! Installment options available

Q3: Are scholarships available?
A: Yes! Government & college scholarships
   Type 4 in main menu for details

Q4: Fee refund policy?
A: Before course starts: Partial refund
   After course starts: No refund

Q5: Additional fees apart from tuition?
A: Exam, library, lab, sports fees apply

Q6: Hostel fees separate?
A: Yes, hostel fees are additional

Q7: How to pay fees?
A: Online/Offline at college office

Q8: Last date for fee payment?
A: As per admission schedule

For fee details:
📞 Call: +91 887 000 5337
Type 0 for FAQ Menu
faq.4:
❓ HOSTEL & TRANSPORT - FAQ

Q1: Is hostel mandatory?
A: No, optional for outstation students

Q2: Separate hostels for boys and girls?
A: Yes! Separate & secure hostels

Q3: Hostel fees?
A: Contact for current rates: +91 887 000 5337

Q4: How many students per room?
A: 2-3 sharing rooms

Q5: Is food included in hostel fees?
A: Yes! 3 meals daily provided

Q6: College bus available?
A: Yes! Multiple routes in Coimbatore

Q7: Bus fees?
A: Depends on distance, contact college

Q8: Can day scholars use college transport?
A: Yes! College bus open to all students

For hostel/transport details:
Type 5 in main menu
Type 0 for FAQ Menu
faq.5:
❓ PLACEMENT & CAREER - FAQ

Q1: Are placements guaranteed?
A: We provide 100% placement assistance
   Final selection depends on performance

Q2: Average salary package?
A: 3.5 LPA average, up to 10 LPA

Q3: When do placements start?
A: Final year (from 5th semester onwards)

Q4: Which companies visit campus?
A: TCS, Infosys, Cognizant, etc.
   Type 6 in main menu for full list

Q5: Do we get internships?
A: Yes! Internship opportunities provided

Q6: Training for placements?
A: Yes! Aptitude, technical, soft skills training

Q7: Can I do higher studies instead of job?
A: Yes! Many students pursue PG/MBA/M.Tech

Q8: Alumni working in which companies?
A: Top MNCs, Banks, Startups, Government

For placement details:
Type 6 in main menu
Type 0 for FAQ Menu

commands.help:
📚 HELP GUIDE

You can type these anytime:

- MENU or 0 → Go to Main Menu
- BACK → Go to previous menu
- HELP → Show this help
- CONTACT → Quick contact info
- APPLY → Direct application link
- DEPARTMENTS → List all schools
- STOP → Pause bot replies

To resume bot replies, type:
HI, HELLO, or HEY

Just type the command exactly as shown.
